channel.title: About on The Mize Collection
channel.description: Recent content in About on The Mize Collection

item.title: About
item.description:
About This Site

This is a collection of notes on random topics that I decided to make public. Keep in mind these are not finished, and I plan to update them over time. I hope this can inspire or helps others. Stay curious, keep building.

I have a genuine curiosity about a wide range of topics. I like to understand how things work under the hood and enjoy building things from scratch as much as possible, because I believe it’s one of the best ways to fully grasp the challenges and the steps involved in how things function.
